title: Made Well — TAX ledger line
description: One line per Land, appended to .madewell/work/tax.jsonl at Verify→Land. The acceptance differential (proposed − accepted): a pure scalar the metabolism does arithmetic on. Made Well owns this stream; the quality organ (Rumen) grazes it as cud if installed — Made Well never writes to .rumen/ and never depends on Rumen being present.

unit.description: The unit/brick that landed — a task id or plain-language slug

commit.description: Optional. The landing commit SHA, once known (the SHA does not exist until after the commit, so this is best-effort / back-fillable)

kind.description: feat | fix | refactor | docs | test | chore — the unit's type

proposed.description: First-pass size — e.g. edits/lines proposed before Verify drove corrections

tax.description: proposed − accepted: the correction cost. The scalar the metabolism reads. Never fold warning events into it.

note.description: Optional free text — context for a tax spike. Explanatory only; never summed.
